title: Drug Use Disorder Support Groups * At Risk Families - 211info
text: - Radius - 5 Miles 10 Miles 25 Miles 50 Miles 100 Miles Search by Provider Name > New Search > Mental & Behavioral Health > Drug Use Disorder Support Groups * At Risk Families 2 Matching Service Providers The mapped locations are estimates, for the exact location of an individual site, select "More Details" Refine Results - Select - No Filter At Risk Families Domestic Violence Issues Men Accessibility Options - Select - No Filter Wheelchair Access (Full) Wheelchair Access (Partial) Accessible Parking (Private Lot) Accessible Parking (Nearby Public/Street Parking) Accessible Restrooms Alternative Communication Formats Virtual Service Options Staff Trained in Disability Awareness Print & Share All Results X Print & Share Print PDF EUGENE RELIEF NURSERY ACCESSING SUCCESS Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Provides support for individuals struggling with substance use or those in recovery. Services include screenings and referrals to treatment providers or community partners as needed. Collaborates with child welfare and local Treatment Court programs. Offers peer support for individuals in recovery, affected family members, and families involved in other Relief Nursery services. 1720 W 25th Avenue Eugene, OR 97405 Eligibility: Families with children age 6 and younger who are enrolled in other Relief Nursery services Hours: Monday-Thursday 9am-5pm, Friday 8:30am-12:30pm. Evening classes available.
